name: Basque Style Eggplant Casserole (Christopher Ranch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a large skillet. Add onion, green peppers, mushrooms, celery, and garlic. Saute until tender.
2. Add tomatoes. Bring to a boil.
3. Add salt and fines herbs. Turn heat off.
4. Simmer sauce for 30 minutes.
5. Peel eggplant and slice into large slices. Dip in egg mixture and fry eggplant in a skillet with remaining oil until tender.
6. Arrange eggplant slices in a large baking dish. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Pour tomato sauce over the top and sprinkle with Swiss cheese.
8. Heat in a 350°F oven until cheese is melted. Serves 4.
